title: apply_member_patch JMAP error codes: invalidPatch vs invalidArguments vs notFound
description: apply_member_patch distinguishes three error conditions with correct JMAP types: unknown patch path → invalidPatch (RFC 8620 §5.3); invalid role value → invalidArguments (bad value in a recognized field); store failure → serverFail. The space_join Ok(None) case was changed from invalidArguments to notFound, which is also correct — the code is syntactically valid, it just doesn't refer to an existing resource. A contributor might collapse these into a single error type for simplicity — resist this. Clients use the type field to decide whether to show 'bad request' vs 'resource not found' UI, and JMAP-aware clients may implement automatic retry on certain error types.
close_reason: Design decision recorded for future reference. No code action required.
